posts.author: Beccy (Beccy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow updates section to do the audio summary (transcribe) like the activities section does.

What are you trying to achieve

Our team travel and use the audio feature on activities so that it transcibes where things are up to as they predominately work from their phones. However, I also need the updates section to allow this. It lets you record audio but I would need to input that audio file into AI to transcribe when the activities section already has this feature. We use the updates section for forecasting/bank etc so when you export to excel/report, it asks if you want to include updates but if the audio isn’t transcribed - nothing shows up. It doesn’t give you the option for activities to be included in the export. Otherwise, allow ‘activities’ to be exported.
